hooks.command: echo 'CAVEMAN MODE ACTIVE. Rules: Drop articles/filler/pleasantries/hedging. Fragments OK. Short synonyms. Pattern: [thing] [action] [reason]. [next step]. Not: Sure! I would be happy to help you with that. Yes: Bug in auth middleware. Fix: Code/commits/security: write normal. User says stop caveman or normal mode to deactivate.'

if [ -d "$(pwd)/docs" ]; then if [ -f "$(pwd)/docs/.jdm-indexed" ]; then echo 'jdocmunch: docs indexed. Use search_sections, get_toc, get_section for doc exploration.'; else echo 'jdocmunch: docs/ exists but not indexed. Run: roborepo index docs docs/'; fi; fi
